programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Twelve contestants square off in the glass break competition with bragging rights and immunity on the line. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The contestants choose to show their fellow competitors a taste of what they're in for this season as some tiptoe the line between cocky and confident. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The contestants face a challenge that's part strategy, part gamesmanship, part skill, and part luck as they're forced to assess each other's games to survive elimination. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: One of the cast's favorites is put to the test in a grueling day of golf that will test everyone's mettle. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The remaining contestants get creative and look to earn immunity by showing whose game is in the best shape. Some find out they may need more work than they thought. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Contestants are forced to go long and see who's got the most confidence in their long game. Those who are successful will find out that confidence pays off. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The remaining contestants look for the right combination to unlock success with their short games. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Bold declarations are made, and the remaining contestants must live up to their own expectations if they hope to survive and advance. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Accuracy will be tested as the final four contestants become the final three. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The final three competitors take on a stretch of holes that includes the infamous Bear Trap to determine who will play for the title.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: It all comes down to this. Two players, 18 holes, match play, and in the end only one will walk away with the title Big Break Champion. From PGA National Resort and Spa in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: Big Break: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with former Big Break competitors Isaac Sanchez and Chad Pfeifer. Sanchez, who goes by the nickname "Sasquatch," is in actuality a gentle giant. But that didn't stop the competitor in him from creating some mythical moments.

programme.desc: A veteran detective and a rookie cop have to stop a master thief's computer virus before it drains all the funds from a bank's accounts.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: Miles is a video game developer who inadvertently becomes the next participant in a real-life death match that streams online. While Miles soon excels at running away from everything, that won't help him outlast Nix, a killer at the top of her game.

programme.title: Tekken: Kazuya's Revenge
programme.desc: A criminal organization kidnaps a young man with amnesia and turns him into a ruthless assassin.

programme.title: Drive Angry 3D
programme.desc: A vengeful father escapes from hell and chases after the men who killed his daughter and kidnapped his granddaughter.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: A hitman who's in Bangkok to pull off a series of jobs violates his personal code when he falls for a local woman and bonds with his errand boy.

programme.title: Bent
programme.desc: A discredited former cop connects a murder case to an elaborate conspiracy involving high-stakes treason.

programme.title: Children of the Corn: Genesis
programme.desc: Seeking refuge at a secluded compound, a couple (Kelen Coleman, Tim Rock) encounters a mysterious cult that worships a possessed boy.

programme.title: Children of the Corn: Runaway
programme.desc: A pregnant woman escapes a murderous child cult in a small town and spends the next decade living anonymously to protect her son. After they move to a new town, she realizes something evil is following them, and she must confront it to save them.

programme.title: Rebel Without a Crew
programme.desc: Alejandro pushes one of his actors for more, testing her creative limit, and her patience; Josh fights through audio issues and time constraints plaguing his film.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: The Gecko brothers flee the liquor store with Ranger Freddie Gonzalez in pursuit; Richie's visions escalate; the Geckos nearly collide with the Fullers, a troubled family making its own desperate journey to Mexico.

programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
programme.desc: Richie struggles with his visions; Seth makes a plan with Carlos to cross the border; the Fullers suffer an RV breakdown; Ranger Gonzalez seeks help from an expert.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: A sheriff must take matters into his own hands when a notorious drug lord escapes from FBI custody and comes speeding toward a showdown in the lawman's quiet border town.

programme.title: Point Break
programme.desc: An FBI agent (Keanu Reeves) turns California surfer to nab bank robbers who wear rubber masks of four ex-presidents.

programme.title: Drive Angry 3D
programme.desc: A vengeful father escapes from hell and chases after the men who killed his daughter and kidnapped his granddaughter.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: A hitman who's in Bangkok to pull off a series of jobs violates his personal code when he falls for a local woman and bonds with his errand boy.

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: Soldiers of Fortune
programme.desc: A former Special Forces soldier (Christian Slater) must protect a group of thrill-seeking millionaires who have paid big bucks to take part in a military excursion.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: A security guard (Liam Hemsworth) and his childhood pal (Michael Angarano) make plans to rob an armored car.

programme.title: In the Name of the King: A Dungeon Siege Tale

programme.title: In the Name of the King 2: Two Worlds
programme.desc: A former special forces soldier is sent back to medieval times to fulfill a prophecy.

programme.title: In the Name of the King 3: The Last Mission

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: A monstrous storm devastates Los Angeles, leaving the streets flooded and infested with sharks.

programme.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
programme.desc: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

programme.title: Empire of the Sharks
programme.desc: In the future, most of Earth is covered by water and the only land is controlled by a warlord and his army of sharks. Humans are kept as food for the sharks until two friends risk their lives to rise against their captor and his legion of sharks.

programme.desc: Global warming has melted Earth's glacial mass, submerging nearly the entire planet in water. Sharks now dominate the planet as one massive school is led by a mutant alpha.

programme.desc: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

programme.title: Green Street Hooligans: Underground
programme.desc: After his brother dies in an organized fight, a one-time hooligan who has become a martial artist returns to avenge the young man.

programme.title: Missing in Action
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) escapes from the Viet Cong, then comes back with a floating arsenal to get others out.

programme.title: Missing in Action 2: The Beginning
programme.desc: An imprisoned U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) fights the military overlord (Oh Soon-tek) of a slave-labor opium operation in Vietnam.

programme.title: Braddock: Missing in Action III
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) returns to Vietnam and fights his way out with his wife, son (Roland Harrah III) and Amerasian orphans.

programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) returns to Vietnam and fights his way out with his wife, son (Roland Harrah III) and Amerasian orphans.

programme.title: Contract Killer
programme.desc: A fast talker (Eric Tsang) engages a Hong Kong rube (Jet Li) to track down the assassin of a sleazy Japanese businessman.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: After their ship is torpedoed by a Japanese submarine, the crew members of the USS Indianapolis face a harrowing nightmare as their ship goes down in the shark infested Philippine Sea.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: A sheriff must take matters into his own hands when a notorious drug lord escapes from FBI custody and comes speeding toward a showdown in the lawman's quiet border town.

programme.title: Killing Them Softly
programme.desc: After a rival crook hires a pair of bumbling thieves (Scoot McNairy, Ben Mendelsohn) to rob their card game, mobsters hire a reluctant hit man (Brad Pitt) to settle the score.

programme.title: The Vatican Tapes
programme.desc: The fate of the world hangs in the balance when a cleric (Peter Andersson) battles an ancient satanic force for a young woman's (Olivia Taylor Dudley) soul.

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: A businessman embarks on a revenge-fueled vendetta after his daughter dies in a terrorist bombing. His search leads to a cat-and-mouse conflict with a British government official whose past may hold the clues to the identities of the elusive killers.

programme.title: Green Street Hooligans: Underground
programme.desc: After his brother dies in an organized fight, a one-time hooligan who has become a martial artist returns to avenge the young man.

programme.title: The Director's Chair

programme.title: The Bill Collector
programme.desc: When a man's debt suddenly comes due, he has less than three weeks to pay back the money.

programme.title: Kickboxer 5: The Redemption
programme.desc: An American kickboxer heads to South Africa to find the promoter responsible for the deaths of two friends.

programme.title: Bent
programme.desc: A discredited former cop connects a murder case to an elaborate conspiracy involving high-stakes treason.

programme.title: The Foreigner

programme.desc: Two brothers (Sean Patrick Flanery, Norman Reedus), believing themselves to be on a mission from God, begin killing members of Boston's underworld.
